text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: Release that tension and just smile!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh... Hehe... Thank you for the tip.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was worried that things might turn out like last
time... But I'm okay now!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We worked as hard as we could, Trainer! Today's
the day I truly blossom and claim first place!
